name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for control-plane release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group. Control-plane owns provisioning for this group.

name: AZURE_LOCATION
notes: Azure region used by shared runtime provisioning.

name: ACR_NAME
notes: Shared Azure Container Registry name.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by Container Apps to pull from ACR.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_NAME
notes: Shared Container Apps environment name.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_VNET_NAME
notes: Parallel workload-profiles Container Apps environment name for the VNet-backed private runtime.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: LOG_ANALYTICS_WORKSPACE_NAME
notes: Shared Log Analytics workspace name.

name: ACA_VNET_NAME
notes: Standalone VNet name that hosts the parallel Container Apps private runtime.

name: ACA_VNET_ADDRESS_SPACE
notes: Address space for the standalone VNet that hosts the parallel Container Apps private runtime.

name: ACA_INFRA_SUBNET_NAME
notes: Subnet name delegated to Microsoft.App/environments for the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: ACA_INFRA_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: CIDR prefix for the delegated Container Apps infrastructure subnet.

name: PRIVATE_ENDPOINT_SUBNET_NAME
notes: Subnet name reserved for storage and Postgres private endpoints.

name: PRIVATE_ENDPOINT_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: CIDR prefix for the private endpoint subnet.

name: ACA_RESERVED_SUBNET_PREFIX
notes: Reserved CIDR range kept unallocated for later network growth inside the standalone runtime VNet.

name: NAT_GATEWAY_NAME
notes: NAT Gateway name used to pin the VNet-backed Container Apps environment to explicit egress.

name: NAT_PUBLIC_IP_NAME
notes: Static public IP resource name attached to the NAT Gateway for the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: ACA_NETWORK_SMOKE_JOB_NAME
notes: Manual Container Apps Job name used to validate internal API reachability plus private DNS and data-plane connectivity from inside the VNet.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Primary storage account for runtime data.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_COMMON
notes: Canonical common container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_BRONZE
notes: Canonical bronze container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_SILVER
notes: Canonical silver container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_GOLD
notes: Canonical gold container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_PLATINUM
notes: Canonical platinum container name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_MARKET
notes: Canonical market folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_FINANCE
notes: Canonical finance folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_EARNINGS
notes: Canonical earnings folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_TARGETS
notes: Canonical price-target folder name.

name: API_APP_NAME
notes: Control-plane Container App name.

name: API_DEPLOY_MANIFEST
notes: Manifest path used by deploy-prod.yml. Use deploy/app_api_public.yaml for the transitional public edge and deploy/app_api.yaml after internal-only cutover.

name: API_ROOT_PREFIX
notes: Optional API root prefix.

name: API_CSP
notes: Control-plane CSP header.

name: API_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
notes: Allowed browser origins for the API.

name: API_OIDC_ISSUER
notes: OIDC issuer url for API auth.

name: API_OIDC_AUDIENCE
notes: OIDC audience or API app id for the API.

name: API_OIDC_JWKS_URL
notes: Explicit JWKS url when discovery is not enough.

name: API_OIDC_REQUIRED_SCOPES
notes: Optional required scopes for API access.

name: API_OIDC_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Optional required roles for API access.

name: AI_RELAY_ENABLED
notes: Enable or disable the control-plane AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MODEL
notes: Deploy-time fixed OpenAI model used by the AI relay.

name: AI_RELAY_REASONING_EFFORT
notes: Reasoning effort passed to reasoning-capable OpenAI models.

name: AI_RELAY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Timeout in seconds for upstream AI relay requests.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_PROMPT_CHARS
notes: Maximum prompt size accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_FILES
notes: Maximum number of files accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_FILE_BYTES
notes: Maximum bytes accepted for a single AI relay upload.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_TOTAL_FILE_BYTES
notes: Maximum combined upload bytes accepted by the AI relay endpoint.

name: AI_RELAY_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
notes: Maximum completion token budget passed to the AI relay model.

name: AI_RELAY_REQUIRED_ROLES
notes: Route-specific roles required to use the AI relay endpoint.

name: UI_API_BASE_URL
notes: Public UI base url used by control-plane runtime config and auth.

name: UI_PUBLIC_HOSTNAME
notes: Stable public UI hostname used for Entra redirect registration and the external UI edge after custom-domain cutover.

name: UI_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
notes: UI Entra app client id.

name: UI_OIDC_AUTHORITY
notes: UI OIDC authority.

name: UI_OIDC_SCOPES
notes: UI delegated scopes.

name: UI_OIDC_REDIRECT_URI
notes: UI redirect uri for Entra auth.

name: API_APP_VNET_NAME
notes: Internal-only API Container App name deployed into the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: UI_APP_VNET_NAME
notes: External UI Container App name deployed into the VNet-backed Container Apps environment.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: JOBS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling jobs repo slug used for repository_dispatch.

name: DISPATCH_APP_ID
notes: GitHub App id used for cross-repo dispatch.

name: LOG_LEVEL
notes: Release and deploy log level.

name: MASSIVE_BASE_URL
notes: Massive API base url.

name: MASSIVE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Massive provider timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN
notes: Alpha Vantage rate limit used by deployment and compatibility flows.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_RATE_WAIT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage wait timeout.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Alpha Vantage worker concurrency.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_POLL_SECONDS
notes: Realtime log poll interval.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_LOOKBACK_SECONDS
notes: Realtime log initial lookback.

name: REALTIME_LOG_STREAM_BATCH_SIZE
notes: Realtime log batch size.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_ARM_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: System health ARM timeout.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_FRESHNESS_OVERRIDES_JSON
notes: System health freshness override json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_JOB_EXECUTIONS_PER_JOB
notes: System health executions per job.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_QUERIES_JSON
notes: System health KQL query json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: System health Log Analytics timeout.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_TIMESPAN_MINUTES
notes: System health Log Analytics timespan.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_LOG_ANALYTICS_WORKSPACE_ID
notes: System health workspace id.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MARKERS_CONTAINER
notes: System health marker container name.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MARKERS_PREFIX
notes: System health marker prefix.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_AGGREGATION
notes: Metrics aggregation.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_API_VERSION
notes: Metrics api version.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_CONTAINERAPP_METRICS
notes: Container App metrics list.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_INTERVAL
notes: Metrics interval.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_JOB_METRICS
notes: Job metrics list.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_THRESHOLDS_JSON
notes: Metrics thresholds json.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_MONITOR_METRICS_TIMESPAN_MINUTES
notes: Metrics timespan.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_RESOURCE_HEALTH_API_VERSION
notes: Resource health api version.

name: SYSTEM_HEALTH_VERBOSE_IDS
notes: Whether to emit verbose Azure resource ids.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY
notes: Alpha Vantage API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: AI_RELAY_API_KEY
notes: OpenAI API key used by the control-plane AI relay. Never auto-discovered.

name: AI_RELAY_SMOKE_BEARER_TOKEN
notes: Optional bearer token used by deploy smoke to verify an authorized AI relay stream.

name: AI_RELAY_SMOKE_FORBIDDEN_BEARER_TOKEN
notes: Optional bearer token used by deploy smoke to verify AI relay role-denied behavior.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
notes: Storage connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: DISPATCH_APP_PRIVATE_KEY
notes: GitHub App private key with literal newline escapes or base64 encoding.

name: RUN_LIVE_MASSIVE_TESTS
notes: Optional local opt-in for live Massive integration tests. Keep false unless intentionally exercising live Massive APIs.

name: MASSIVE_API_KEY
notes: Massive API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: POSTGRES_SERVER_NAME
notes: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server name used during provisioning and DSN generation.

name: POSTGRES_DATABASE_NAME
notes: Control-plane Postgres database name used during provisioning and DSN generation.

name: POSTGRES_ADMIN_USER
notes: Azure Postgres administrator username used during provisioning and DSN regeneration.

name: POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD
notes: Azure Postgres administrator password used during provisioning and DSN regeneration.

name: POSTGRES_DSN
notes: Control-plane Postgres connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional primary Python package index used by CI and release workflows when private package publication is enabled.

name: PYTHON_PACKAGE_EXTRA_INDEX_URL
notes: Optional extra Python package index used by CI and release workflows when private package publication is enabled.
